description_long: This house is a modern, flat-roofed residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring numerous trees and a driveway. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows and open courtyards visible from multiple angles. The front facade is defined by a central entryway, flanked by two prominent cubic forms that may serve as garages or additional rooms. The property is bordered by a tree-lined street, and the grounds include paved walkways and green lawns. The exterior materials appear to be a mix of concrete, glass, and metal, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, cubic forms, and landscaped grounds, featuring a central entryway and tree-lined street frontage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, flanked by two large cubic structures and a landscaped driveway with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the cubic volumes, and the rear garden area with additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing open courtyards, large windows, and the integration of green spaces within the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, tree-lined street, and the house's layered, rectangular layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and minimalistic door flanked by cubic volumes
